_meta.seam: every backend-touching control routes through sendIntent(Intent) in app/src/ipc.ts
_meta.wired_to_legend: intent name | custom:<name> | connector:<ns.method> | tauri-ipc:<x> | local-only | none/dead
_meta.backend_capability_note: backend_capability_available names the host capability, intent, or rpc method this control could reach; many are LOG-ONLY (recorded but no host side effect) or backend-only (built but no route)
_meta.clicks_note: current_clicks_estimate = user gestures to fire the control's promised outcome; for mock/dead controls the outcome is never delivered (estimate 0)
